title: Cohort Leaderboard Ranked by Nuggets
description: The system shall provide a cohort leaderboard that ranks students based on the total nuggets earned within a configurable time window.
rationale: This requirement allows students to track their progress and compare it with peers, fostering a sense of competition and motivation.
business_value: Enhances student engagement and performance by providing visibility into ranking and progress.

source.description: As a student, I need a cohort leaderboard ranked by nuggets over a configurable window so that I can track my progress and see how I compare with peers.

acceptance_criteria: Given the leaderboard is enabled by the instructor
And I have not opted out
When I view the cohort leaderboard
Then I see myself and other students ranked by total nuggets earned in the configured time window
preconditions: The leaderboard feature is enabled for the student's cohort
The student has not opted out of the leaderboard
postconditions: Student sees their rank based on total nuggets earned within the configured time window
Student sees ranks of other students in the cohort based on total nuggets earned within the configured time window
functional_constraints: Leaderboard data is aggregated over a configurable time window
Students can opt out of appearing on the leaderboard
Instructors can disable the entire leaderboard for the cohort

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system shall respond within 2 seconds to display the leaderboard.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The leaderboard must be available at least 99.5% of the time during regular operations.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system shall support up to 10,000 students on the leaderboard simultaneously without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable; the interface should be intuitive and easy to navigate.

edge_cases: What happens when the configured time window is set to a period where no nuggets have been earned?
How does the system handle changes in the time window while students are viewing the leaderboard?
dependencies: Student accounts and their nugget data

interfaces.name: Student Data Store
interfaces.description: The system retrieves student nugget data from this database to populate the leaderboard.

interfaces.name: Cohort Settings API
interfaces.description: This API is used to check if the leaderboard is enabled and retrieve the current time window configuration.

interfaces.name: Leaderboard Display
interfaces.description: The user interface displays the leaderboard based on data fetched from the database and settings from the API.

test_cases.description: Verify that the leaderboard is displayed when the feature is enabled by the instructor.
test_cases.expected_result: The leaderboard should be visible to students who have not opted out.

test_cases.description: Check the functionality of the configurable time window on the leaderboard.
test_cases.expected_result: Students should see their rank based on nuggets earned within the configured time window.
